name: Network Denial of Service Amplification
description: Detects potential network DoS amplification attacks originating from internal hosts
query:
// Detect DoS amplification patterns
// Trigger on high-volume UDP traffic to external targets
events from ndr_flow
where protocol = "UDP"
  and bytes_sent > 1000000
  and destination_port in (53, 123, 161, 389, 1900, 11211)
group by source_ip, destination_ip
having count(*) > 10
within 120 seconds
